productDisplayName: Indigo Nation Men Cream Trouser Cream Trousers
description: Composition Beige full length formal trousers made of 65% polyester and 35% viscose, has a flat front with two pockets on the sides, two buttoned welt pockets on the back, and metal zipper and button closure Fitting Regular Wash care Hand/machine wash in cold water with mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach or wring Drip dry in shade Warm iron Classy trousers are the mark of a gentleman. These beige formal trousers from indigo nation will go a long way in making you the most sophisticated-looking man at any gathering. Made from the choicest of selected fabrics, they are perfectly fitted for office wear and any other formal occasion when you want to look your best effortlessly. Pair them with a crisp formal shirt and leather shoes to look spectacular. Model statistics The model wears trousers of length 41.5" Height-6.1", waist-31"
